description: A company is reorganizing two departments, which will result in changes to reporting structures.

nodes.task_description: Receive the new organizational chart from leadership.
Plan the bulk updates needed in the HRIS to reflect the new reporting structures.

expected_outcome.value: HRBP maps out all the required employee record changes.

nodes.task_description: Execute the bulk updates in the HRIS on the effective date of the reorganization.

expected_outcome.value: HRBP successfully updates all manager and department fields for the affected employees.
